name: lusha-plugins
description: Official Lusha plugins for Claude — B2B contact intelligence, signal-based prospecting, and verified phone number workflows.

plugins.name: lusha
plugins.description: Connect Lusha to Claude to prospect and act on buying signals without leaving your conversation. Start from a trigger — a funding round, hiring surge, or leadership change — and surface verified phone numbers for the right decision makers in one workflow. Also covers single contact lookup, ICP-driven list building, and lookalike expansion.
